description: Per-class evidence profile for discrepancy_class 'confidence' — an estimate became too uncertain to answer reliably; triggers cycle-count, measurement action or steward-review. Connects Restunsicherheit-as-a-feature to the steward queue. Emitted with kgNodeLabel ConfidenceDiscrepancy (services/discrepancy-engine/src/snapshot.ts classDiscrepancyLabel:109-110). The metric/confidence_level/sigma/threshold evidence block mirrors the detector's declared evidence contract ConfidenceInput (services/discrepancy-engine/src/detector.ts:310-315). Like the sibling drift detector, the confidence detector is currently an interface-level type contract (ConfidenceDetector, detector.ts:321) pending the view-engine confidence thresholds; the label + evidence shape are declared here so the projection is contract-conformant once it lands. Inherits the full lifecycle from Discrepancy.
